benefits.name: $100 Resy Credit
benefits.description: Up to $50 in statement credits from January through June and again from July through December for eligible U.S. Resy purchases.
benefits.activationMethod: Enroll and use the Gold Card at eligible U.S. Resy restaurants or other eligible Resy purchases.
benefits.finePrint: Enrollment required. Semi-annual cap applies.

benefits.name: $84 Dunkin' Credit
benefits.description: Up to $7 in monthly statement credits at eligible U.S. Dunkin' locations.
benefits.activationMethod: Enroll and use the Gold Card at eligible U.S. Dunkin' locations.
benefits.finePrint: Enrollment required. Monthly cap applies.

benefits.name: $120 Dining Credit
benefits.description: Up to $10 in monthly statement credits at eligible partners such as Grubhub, The Cheesecake Factory, Goldbelly, Wine.com, and Five Guys.
benefits.activationMethod: Enroll and use the Gold Card with participating dining partners.
benefits.finePrint: Enrollment required. Monthly cap applies.

benefits.name: $120 Uber Cash
benefits.description: Get $10 in Uber Cash each month for eligible Uber rides and orders in the U.S.
benefits.activationMethod: Add the Gold Card to your Uber account and select an Amex Card for the transaction.
benefits.finePrint: Monthly credits do not roll over and are limited to eligible U.S. rides and orders.

benefits.name: The Hotel Collection Benefit
benefits.description: Eligible bookings through Amex Travel include a property credit toward eligible charges at participating hotels.
benefits.activationMethod: Book an eligible stay through Amex Travel using the Gold Card.
benefits.finePrint: Two-night minimum stay required. Eligible charges vary by property.

benefits.name: Baggage Insurance Plan
benefits.description: Coverage for eligible lost, damaged, or stolen baggage when covered travel is charged to the card.
benefits.activationMethod: Charge eligible common-carrier travel to the Gold Card.
benefits.finePrint: Coverage limits, exclusions, and terms apply.

benefits.name: Car Rental Loss and Damage Insurance
benefits.description: Coverage for eligible rental car damage or theft when the rental is reserved and paid for with the card.
benefits.activationMethod: Reserve and pay for the full rental with the Gold Card and decline the rental company's collision damage waiver.
benefits.finePrint: Coverage type, limits, exclusions, and territory rules apply.

benefits.name: Trip Delay Insurance
benefits.description: Can reimburse certain additional expenses when a covered trip is delayed beyond the stated threshold.
benefits.activationMethod: Pay for an eligible round-trip fare with the Gold Card.
benefits.finePrint: Coverage limits and claim conditions apply.

benefits.name: Global Assist Hotline
benefits.description: 24/7 emergency coordination services when traveling more than 100 miles from home.
benefits.activationMethod: Call the assistance line when traveling and support is needed.
benefits.finePrint: Card Members are responsible for third-party service charges.

benefits.name: Extended Warranty
benefits.description: Can extend the original manufacturer's warranty on eligible purchases.
benefits.activationMethod: Use the Gold Card for eligible purchases and retain supporting documentation.
benefits.finePrint: Coverage limits, exclusions, and terms apply.

benefits.name: Purchase Protection
benefits.description: Can help protect eligible purchases against accidental damage, theft, or loss for a limited period after purchase.
benefits.activationMethod: Use the Gold Card for eligible purchases and file a claim when needed.
benefits.finePrint: Coverage limits, exclusions, and terms apply.

benefits.name: $200 Uber Cash
benefits.description: Get $15 in Uber Cash each month plus a $20 bonus in December for eligible Uber rides and orders in the U.S.
benefits.activationMethod: Add the Platinum Card to your Uber account and select an Amex Card for the transaction.
benefits.finePrint: Monthly credits do not roll over and are limited to eligible U.S. rides and orders.

benefits.name: $120 Uber One Credit
benefits.description: Up to $120 in statement credits each calendar year after purchase of an eligible auto-renewing Uber One membership in the U.S.

benefits.finePrint: Available on eligible U.S. memberships.

benefits.name: $300 Digital Entertainment Credit
benefits.description: Up to $25 per month in statement credits for eligible purchases with select digital entertainment partners.

benefits.name: $400 Resy Credit
benefits.description: Up to $100 in statement credits each quarter for eligible Resy purchases, including dining at eligible U.S. Resy restaurants.

benefits.name: $600 Hotel Credit

benefits.activationMethod: Book eligible prepaid stays through Amex Travel and pay with the Platinum Card.
benefits.finePrint: The Hotel Collection requires a two-night minimum stay.

benefits.name: Premium Hotel Status
benefits.description: Complimentary hotel status and on-property benefits are available with participating programs.

benefits.name: $200 Airline Fee Credit
benefits.description: Up to $200 in statement credits per calendar year for incidental fees with one selected qualifying airline.

benefits.finePrint: Enrollment required. Airfare does not qualify.

benefits.name: $209 CLEAR Plus Credit
benefits.description: Up to $209 in statement credits per calendar year for an eligible CLEAR Plus membership.
benefits.activationMethod: Enroll and pay for CLEAR Plus with the Platinum Card.
benefits.finePrint: Subject to auto-renewal and excludes applicable taxes and fees.

benefits.name: $200 Oura Ring Credit

benefits.name: Platinum Nights by Resy

benefits.name: Global Entry or TSA PreCheck Application Credit
benefits.description: Receive either a statement credit for Global Entry every 4 years or TSA PreCheck every 4.5 years when the application fee is charged to the card.
benefits.activationMethod: Pay the eligible application fee with the Platinum Card.
benefits.finePrint: Only one program credit is available during each eligibility window.

benefits.name: $100 Saks Fifth Avenue Credit
benefits.description: Up to $50 in statement credits semi-annually for purchases at Saks Fifth Avenue or saks.com.

benefits.name: $300 Equinox Credit

benefits.name: Walmart+ Monthly Membership Credit

benefits.name: $300 lululemon Credit

benefits.activationMethod: Use the card for eligible StubHub purchases during the promotion period.
benefits.finePrint: Activation, merchant, and promotional terms apply.

benefits.name: $120 in Lyft Credits
benefits.description: Eligible Lyft purchases can receive statement credits during the active program window.
benefits.activationMethod: Use the card for eligible Lyft purchases during the promotion period.
benefits.finePrint: Activation, merchant, and promotional terms apply.

benefits.name: IHG One Rewards Platinum Elite Status
benefits.description: Eligible cardholders can enroll in hotel elite status benefits with IHG One Rewards.
benefits.activationMethod: Complete the issuer's activation or enrollment flow.
benefits.finePrint: Enrollment required. Hotel benefits vary by property and stay.

benefits.name: Reserve Travel Designers
benefits.description: Cardholders can access travel planning assistance through the issuer's travel advisor program.
benefits.activationMethod: Contact the eligible travel service channel.
benefits.finePrint: Availability and service scope may vary.

benefits.name: Primary Auto Rental Coverage
benefits.description: Can provide primary coverage for theft and collision damage on eligible rental cars.
benefits.activationMethod: Pay for the full rental with the card and decline the rental company's collision insurance.
benefits.finePrint: Coverage type, exclusions, and territory rules apply.

benefits.name: Trip Cancellation and Interruption Insurance
benefits.description: Can reimburse covered prepaid travel expenses when a qualifying trip is canceled or interrupted for a covered reason.
benefits.activationMethod: Pay for eligible travel with the card and submit a qualifying claim when needed.
benefits.finePrint: Coverage limits, exclusions, and claim rules apply.

benefits.name: Trip Delay Reimbursement
benefits.description: Can reimburse eligible out-of-pocket expenses when a covered trip is delayed beyond the issuer's threshold.
benefits.activationMethod: Pay for eligible travel with the card and submit a qualifying claim when needed.
benefits.finePrint: Coverage limits, exclusions, and claim rules apply.

benefits.name: Lost Luggage Reimbursement
benefits.description: Can reimburse eligible losses when baggage is lost or damaged on a covered trip.
benefits.activationMethod: Pay for eligible travel with the card and submit a qualifying claim when needed.
benefits.finePrint: Coverage limits, exclusions, and claim rules apply.

benefits.name: Baggage Delay Insurance
benefits.description: Can reimburse essential purchases when baggage is delayed on a covered trip.
benefits.activationMethod: Pay for eligible travel with the card and submit a qualifying claim when needed.
benefits.finePrint: Coverage limits, exclusions, and claim rules apply.

benefits.name: Auto Rental Collision Damage Waiver
benefits.description: Can provide theft and collision coverage for eligible rental vehicles used for business purposes.
benefits.activationMethod: Pay for the full rental with the card and decline the rental company's collision insurance.
benefits.finePrint: Coverage type, exclusions, and territory rules apply.

benefits.name: Purchase Protection
benefits.description: Can help protect eligible new purchases against damage or theft for a limited period after purchase.
benefits.activationMethod: Use the card for eligible purchases and file a claim when needed.
benefits.finePrint: Coverage limits, exclusions, and claim rules apply.

benefits.name: Extended Warranty Protection
benefits.description: Can extend the original U.S. manufacturer's warranty on eligible purchases.
benefits.activationMethod: Use the card for eligible purchases and keep supporting documentation.
benefits.finePrint: Coverage limits, exclusions, and claim rules apply.

benefits.name: Travel and Emergency Assistance Services
benefits.description: Access to emergency referrals and support while traveling away from home.
benefits.activationMethod: Call the eligible assistance line when support is needed.
benefits.finePrint: Cardholders are responsible for charges from third-party service providers.

benefits.name: Roadside Dispatch
benefits.description: Access to a pay-per-use roadside assistance dispatch service.
benefits.activationMethod: Call the roadside dispatch number when eligible assistance is needed.
benefits.finePrint: Service fees apply and coverage is subject to program terms.

benefits.name: Cell Phone Protection
benefits.description: Can provide coverage for eligible cell phone damage or theft when the monthly bill is paid with the card.
benefits.activationMethod: Pay the eligible monthly wireless bill with the card and file a qualifying claim when needed.
benefits.finePrint: Coverage limits, deductibles, exclusions, and claim rules apply.

benefits.name: DashPass Membership and Quarterly Promos
benefits.description: Cardholders can receive a complimentary DashPass membership window plus rotating non-restaurant DoorDash promos.
benefits.activationMethod: Activate the offer with DoorDash using the eligible card.
benefits.finePrint: Enrollment required. Promotional windows and terms can change.

benefits.name: Lyft Partner Offer
benefits.description: Eligible Lyft purchases can qualify for an elevated partner offer during the issuer's promotional period.
benefits.activationMethod: Pay eligible Lyft purchases with the card during the active promotion.
benefits.finePrint: Offer terms and expiration dates apply.
